error.workspace_root_invalid: Workspace root must be a directory (e.g. D:\\video-localization-tool\\workspace\\jobs), not a video file path.
error.generic: Something went wrong. See details below.

edit.subtitle_empty: Initialize a local job or open one from Dashboard to start the 4-step edit flow.

import.entry_local_body: Bring MP4, MOV, or MKV into the localization pipeline. Validate file access before job initialization.
import.advanced_summary: Advanced options — translation, voice, subtitles, OCR
import.entry_url_body: Probe a remote source first, then initialize a local job from the downloaded video.
import.input_sub: Drag a video file from your computer to begin.
import.drop_big: Drag and drop your video here
import.drop_small: MP4, MKV, MOV… or click to choose a file.
import.url_job_id_label: Job ID override for URL import
import.local_note: Browser file pickers may not expose an absolute path. Paste the full path above if initialization fails.
import.metadata_sub: Preview metadata and import defaults for the selected local video.
import.target_mode_hint: Shows whether the job folder will use the custom root from the top bar or the default Job directory.
import.target_root_hint: Top-level folder that will contain the job workspace.
import.target_job_folder_hint: Final workspace path that will be created for this imported video.
import.target_job_id_hint: Override this only when you need a stable manual slug. Otherwise the app will derive it automatically.
import.preview_empty: Choose or drag in a local video to preview its metadata and import readiness.
import.hint_duration: Detected from the local video probe or the initialized job manifest.
import.hint_file_size: File size from the selected local file when the browser exposes it.
import.hint_job_id: Internal folder slug used to create and reopen this job.
import.hint_workspace: Workspace directory created for this specific video job.
import.hint_input_path: Resolved source file copied into the job input folder.
import.hint_status: Current readiness of this source for the next pipeline step.
import.doctor_sub: Runtime doctor checks for download, translate, TTS, and render dependencies.
import.config_sub: Pick the TTS provider. Translation always runs through the app's server; fine-tune in the Dịch step.
import.subtitle_source_sub: Use local ASR or import an existing .srt (e.g. from CapCut) before continuing.
import.external_srt_required: Choose a .srt file when using Import SRT mode.
import.external_srt_project_failed: Could not import SRT for video {video}.
import.per_video_external_srt_placeholder: Absolute path to .srt, or leave empty to use the global pick
import.auto_translate_auto_sub: Run transcription and translation automatically before the review gate.
import.auto_translate_manual_sub: Only transcribe first, then upload an SRT in Subtitle Review.
import.translate_backend_block_v2_hint: Block-based translation for short conversational subtitle chunks.
import.translate_backend_legacy_hint: Whole-document translation for longer continuous text.
import.tts_provider_edge_hint: Free Microsoft Edge TTS with solid baseline quality.
import.tts_provider_azure_hint: Higher-end Azure TTS; requires Azure credentials.
import.multi_path_required: At least one selected video has no absolute path. Re-add files using the desktop file dialog, or paste full paths.
import.path_required: Enter an absolute local video path before initializing the job.
import.path_invalid_file: Local video path must point to a video file (e.g. .mp4/.mov/.mkv), not a workspace/jobs folder.
import.url_required: Enter a video URL before probing or downloading.

download.sub: Paste video URLs (one per line), preview metadata, then download each into a job folder.
download.ytdlp_warning: Video Localization Tool is currently most reliable when downloading from Bilibili. Other sites may fail depending on the platform.
download.output_hint: Jobs are created under the folder below (same as Jobs workspace root in the top bar when set). Default is ./Downloads next to the app or repo.
download.default_folder_failed: Could not resolve default Downloads folder.
download.output_required: Enter the folder where new job workspaces should be created.
download.urls_required: Enter at least one URL (one per line).
download.force_reuse: Allow overwrite when a job folder already exists (force)
download.open_this_edit: Open this job in Edit Video
download.open_edit: Open last job in Edit Video
download.workspace_missing: Set a jobs folder or use default Downloads first.

settings.context_sub: Settings are scoped to the selected video workspace, with optional project-wide defaults.
settings.project_save_hint: Only when a parent multi-video project is open. Single-video jobs: use Save per-video.
settings.hint_single_video:
Single-video job (no project root):
1) Configure subtitle style and TTS, then click Save to write them into the workspace.
2) Click Extract Audio and Translate and wait for it to finish — Subtitle Review only opens once extraction is ready.
3) Project-wide defaults are only available for child jobs opened from a multi-video project on the Dashboard.
settings.run_failed:
Translation failed at the «{stage}» stage: {message}
Check your remaining minutes/tokens, or open the job logs (job_state.json · artifacts/logs) for details.
settings.notice_loaded: Loaded saved subtitle and TTS settings.
settings.notice_run_until_edit_manual: Transcription finished. Upload or revise the translated SRT in Subtitle Review.
settings.empty_body: Initialize a job from the Import screen or open one from Dashboard before editing text and audio settings.

text_audio.title: Subtitle + Voice Settings
text_audio.sub: Configure subtitle styling and TTS in one place before the review gate.

subtitle.title: Subtitle Text Settings
subtitle.sub: Font and basic typography here; burn-in position, size, and background are adjusted in Subtitle Review.
subtitle.preview_sample: I am still here, just delayed by a beat.
subtitle.margin_v_hint: Higher = move the line further up from the bottom edge so the box can sit over hard-coded source text. Try 40–180, re-render, then fine-tune.
subtitle.font_size_hint: 0 = automatic size. Use 26–40 when embedded subtitles are large.
subtitle.burn_moved_hint: Position, burn font size, and subtitle background are configured on the Subtitle Review screen (with live preview on the player).

extractor.title: Source Subtitle Extractor
extractor.sub: Choose automatic speech recognition (offline) or import a ready-made SRT (e.g. from CapCut).

hint.audio_only: Use faster-whisper to transcribe from audio. Fastest default.
hint.ocr_only: Read burned-in captions via PaddleOCR. Best when audio is missing or noisy.
hint.hybrid: Run ASR and OCR in parallel and merge. Use when both audio and burned-in captions exist (e.g. Chinese videos).
hint.external_srt: Skip ASR: copy and normalize an external .srt into the workspace (CapCut / YouTube / manual).

extractor.srt_pick_failed: Could not open the file picker. Paste the full path to your .srt below, or run the desktop shell (python -m desktop.native).
extractor.srt_pick_browser_no_path: This environment cannot send an absolute file path to the server. Paste the full path to your .srt in the field below, or use the desktop window app.
extractor.srt_invalid: Please choose a .srt file (UTF-8 or UTF-16).
extractor.legacy_banner: This workspace used an older OCR/hybrid extractor setting. It has been switched to Audio (ASR).
extractor.asr_note: Transcription uses the desktop defaults (faster-whisper, CPU-friendly). Adjust source language above to speed up Chinese runs.
extractor.test_button: Test OCR on a single frame
extractor.test_no_text: OCR found no text in this region.

translation.title: Translation Settings
translation.sub: Source handling, backend choice, and QA toggles before review.
translation.cleanup_sub: Generate source_cleaned_zh.srt before translation when needed.
translation.qa_sub: Run quality checks before seeding edited_voice.srt.
translation.run_hint: These settings are sent inline to /api/run-until-edit. The selected source language speeds up transcription before translation.
translation.run_hint_manual: This mode extracts source subtitles in the selected language, then stops so Review can accept an uploaded translation SRT.
translation.progress_ready_review: Translation is ready for subtitle review.
translation.api_key_required: Enter an OpenAI API key in App Settings before using automatic translation.

voice_edit_gate.title: Subtitle translation finished
voice_edit_gate.body: Continue to voice synthesis with the current script, or pause to review, edit inline, or upload a replacement SRT.

tts.title: Text-to-Speech Settings
tts.sub: Voice generation defaults and audio mix policy.
tts.filter_current_hidden: The selected voice is outside the current filters, so it is kept here until you choose another voice.
tts.scope_value: Voice settings apply after subtitle approval
tts.preview_sub: Generate a short sample with the current provider, voice, and speed.
tts.azure_hint: Azure credentials are configured in App Settings. The app keeps one selected voice and only switches Azure credentials if the primary profile stalls.

bgm.title: Background Music
bgm.sub: Optional BGM mixed into the final audio after voice generation.
bgm.loop_sub: Repeat short tracks until the output ends.
bgm.confirm_remove: Remove the selected background music from this workspace?
bgm.pick_unavailable: Could not get an absolute audio file path. Use the desktop window app or paste a file path through the native picker.

render_layout.title: Video frame
render_layout.sub: Choose the final aspect ratio and an optional image behind the source video.
render_layout.background_ready: Used behind the video when the frame has empty space.
render_layout.confirm_remove: Remove the selected background image from this workspace?
render_layout.pick_unavailable: Could not get an absolute image file path. Use the desktop window app or paste a file path through the native picker.
render_layout.logo_sub: Overlay your logo on the video (a frame corner). PNG with transparency recommended.
render_layout.logo_ready: Logo will be overlaid at render time.
render_layout.logo_confirm_remove: Remove the logo from this workspace?
render_layout.clips_sub: Trim the head/tail of the localized video and bolt on your intro/outro clips.
render_layout.head_trim_hint: Seconds to cut from the start (e.g. drop the competitor's original hook/intro).
render_layout.tail_trim_hint: Seconds to cut from the end (e.g. drop the competitor's original outro/CTA).
render_layout.clip_confirm_remove: Remove the clip from this workspace?

review.empty_title: No job selected for subtitle review
review.empty_body: Run a job until the edit gate or open one from Dashboard before reviewing subtitles.

banner.edit_gate: Review and approve subtitles before voice generation.
banner.approved: Subtitles are approved for voice generation. Save new edits and approve again if you change the script.

segment.label: Segment {index}
segment.note: Long videos are reviewed as one merged voice script. Segment rail is for navigation and context only.

review.burn_card_sub: Tune vertical lift, font size, and optional box background. The player above updates as you change values.
review.burn_preview_hint: Preview matches render intent (scaled from a 1080p reference). Save when you are happy with placement.
review.context_sub: Keyboard-friendly editing with synchronized playback. The merged parent script is the source of truth before TTS.
review.editor_sub: Final decision point before TTS. Save draft changes first, then approve for voice.

table.voice_text_transcript: Voice line (edit text; source shown above when not auto-translating)

provenance.fused_drift: Fused ASR + OCR (mild drift — kept OCR)
provenance.fused_disagreement: ASR and OCR disagree — needs manual review

sticky.unsaved_sub: Save draft changes before approving the latest subtitle script.
sticky.changed_sub: TTS and Render remain locked until the merged edited_voice.srt is approved.
sticky.approved_sub: You can move to the Render screen or keep editing and approve again later.
sticky.clean_sub: Edit translated voice text here, then save draft and approve for voice.

review.upload_srt_hint: SRT must contain the same number of cues as artifacts/transcribe/source.srt.
review.download_source_hint: Download the extracted source.srt if you want to translate it outside the tool, then upload the translated SRT here.
review.notice_uploaded: Replacement SRT applied and marked ready for voice.
review.notice_downstream_done: Voice generation and final render finished. Opening the Export step.

downstream.card_sub: This may take a while. You can leave this screen open.

review.empty_filtered: No cues match the current filters.
review.empty_no_cues: No subtitle cues in this workspace yet (run-until-edit has not completed successfully, or it failed). Go back to Text & Audio: Save per-video if needed, then Run Until Edit Gate until it succeeds.
review.demo_sub: Preview a subtitle on a frame from the source video and audition the voice.
review.demo_play_failed: Could not generate the voice preview.
review.demo_no_workspace: Open a job to use the demo preview.
review.demo_unsupported_hint: The frame is sampled from input/source.mp4. If the video has not loaded yet, wait a moment and retry.
review.demo_save_failed: Could not save the ducking level.
review.duck_gain_hint_active: 0% = -30 dB (deepest cut). 100% = 0 dB (keep original at full level).
review.duck_gain_hint_disabled: Enable 'Duck original speech' in Text & Audio to unlock this slider.
review.clone_hint: Upload a 6–30s clip to clone a voice (XTTS). Pick the sample in the Voice column per cue.
review.sample_pick_unavailable: Could not open the file picker.

render.empty_body: Approve subtitles in the Review screen or open a job from Dashboard before rendering.
render.execution_sub: Downstream stages unlock after subtitle approval.
render.artifacts_empty: No downstream artifacts yet. Approve subtitles and run the pipeline to generate output.
render.config_summary_sub: Values used for this export (from Import + Text & Audio).
render.locked_hint: Run After Approval stays locked until voice_edited is true.
render.locked_hint_export: Confirm subtitles in Review first. Export unlocks after the script is approved (voice_edited).
render.preview_sub: Render settings summary and current output package.

diag.empty_body: Open a job from Dashboard to inspect logs, artifacts, and state.

logs.title: Live Logs
logs.sub: Technical visibility without cluttering the main workflow.
logs.empty: No log lines yet for this workspace.

artifacts.title: Canonical Artifacts
artifacts.sub: Open, reveal, or copy path for each tracked output.
artifacts.empty: No artifacts found yet for this workspace.

state.title: State
state.sub: Current pipeline truth for the selected job.

summary.title: Runtime Summary
summary.sub: Current execution status and quick actions.

quick_state.title: Quick State
quick_state.sub: Fast snapshot of the selected workspace.

app_settings.title: Application Settings
app_settings.sub: Configure language and API keys for the entire application.
app_settings.api_key_sub: This key is used for automatic translation. You only need to set it once.
app_settings.translation_model_hint: Used for source cleanup and subtitle translation. Leave blank to keep the resolved default ({model}).
app_settings.key_hint: You need to enter an OpenAI API Key to use the automatic translation feature.
app_settings.key_edit_hint: Leave the field empty to keep the saved OpenAI key unchanged.
app_settings.azure_sub: Save one primary Azure profile and one backup profile. During TTS, the app keeps the same selected voice and only switches credentials if Azure becomes congested.
app_settings.azure_fallback: Use backup Azure profile when the primary profile stalls
app_settings.azure_hint_env: If no profile is saved here, the app falls back to AZURE_SPEECH_KEY / AZURE_SPEECH_REGION from the environment.
app_settings.advanced_sub: Provider credentials and fallback settings that are rarely changed.
app_settings.voices_sub: Manage Edge and Azure voices available in Text & Audio.
app_settings.voices_search: Search label, locale, or voice id
app_settings.voices_limited: Showing the first 160 matching voices. Refine search to see fewer rows.
